name: Bill Bellamy
blurb: He became a fixture on MTV as a VJ and host before moving into film and television roles.
bio: Bill Bellamy is an American stand-up comedian and actor who gained national attention on HBO's Def Comedy Jam, where his routine popularized the phrase booty call. He became a fixture on MTV as a VJ and host before moving into film and television roles. He has continued touring and releasing stand-up specials over a career spanning four decades.

timeline.ev: Performs the Booty Call bit on Def Comedy Jam
Becomes a host and VJ on MTV
Releases Comedy Central special Back to My Roots
Releases special I Want My Life Back

accolades: Credited with popularizing the phrase booty call on Def Comedy Jam
Longtime MTV VJ and host of MTV Beach House
Host of NBC's Last Comic Standing, seasons 5 and 6

specials.t: Bill Bellamy: Back to My Roots
Bill Bellamy: I Want My Life Back

bits.yt_title: Bill Bellamy | Booty Call - Russell Simmons' Def Comedy Jam, Season 2
